title: Chapter 106
content:
Chapter 106: Shouldn’t be

Lower and lower.

Then another thought crossed his mind.

’But... Before I make my next move, I want to understand something first.’

"Huh?"

Denzel rubbed the back of his neck.

"I know it probably seems improper to ask, but I genuinely want to know. It’s something that’ll help me validate my dare. So if you don’t want to answer, that’s your choice."

Another pause.

"But I’m not actually just trying to be a pervert. I am a pervert, that I won’t deny, but this time I’m asking for you."

"Asking for me? What’s that supposed to mean? Sounds alot like it’s a full on perverted question." Sarah managed to mutter, completely surprised she was capable of saying all those once.

His gaze remained fixed on her before he took a short chuckle, running his hand through his face in a calm demeanor.

"I just want to make sure that you’d enjoy my dare as much as I would."

Then inwardly, he added his real malicious thoughts.

’Because I’m damn sure I’m going to enjoy it....Most especially when I give you a Supreme punishment for keeping that pussy away from men.’

Sarah stared at him for a moment, using what was left of her untried brain cells to think about what possible response or action she was to do.

However, she lowered her gaze, running frantic thoughts through herself.

’I can’t even think properly. I feel like I shouldn’t answer his question...But why am I trembling so much right now? Why do I feel so much more like I’m his bitch?’

Her cheeks burned hot. She couldn’t even bring herself to look up at him.

"It’s just... it’s just...Umm...ugh, why am I even trying to tell you this?" She cursed to herself, a little chuckle escaping her lips as she shaked her head.

Her voice trailed off. After a few seconds, she finally muttered as she used her palm to whip the remnants of her love juices with a clothe which rested on the floor of the closet with her.

"We have a strict rule. Ever since I had a baby, I don’t really let her do much around my pussy. It always...umm...It always brings back weird memories and sensations. So I mostly just let her do whatever she wants anywhere else... mostly my ass."

She took a brief pause.

"And then that’s it."

’Huh. This girl is an anal freak, for real? Well, that does explain why she was so moved by me making her cum so much. Since she hasn’t been properly satisfied by a man, it does seem a tad bit obvious that she was flabbergasted with my skills. Hehe...I feel so good!’

"That’s it?"

He tilted his head.

"Well then... I don’t want to know too much about your relationship with women. But since our methods are obviously pretty different, all I can really say now is... I dare you to suc—"

As he was saying this, Denzel raised his hand, lifting a few fingers towards his lips as he paused.

"Hmm..."

His eyes drifted down to his hand, lingering on his fingers—most especially his long middle finger.

’Hmm...my skill is still very active now, isn’t it? maybe instead of charging her with my dare like qn animal, I should dig in a little more depth.’ he thought inwardly.

A moment later, he shifted his gaze back to Sarah.

She was still sitting on the closet floor, looking up at him.

Denzel stared at her for a few seconds before finally muttering,

"How did it make you feel?"

Sarah blinked.

"Huh? What’s that?"

’There might be more to this than I thought.’ Denzel mused inwardly.

Then he repeated himself.

’This is the tricky part.’ he thought. Then he shrugged.

"I’m asking. So answering me is entirely your choice."

He spread his hands slightly.

"Whether you answer or not is completely up to you."

His smirk widened.

Sarah lowered her gaze.

For a few seconds, she remained silent, accessing whether or not it would be wise to answer him. Then she quietly answered.

"It made me feel very good. It hurt at first."

A faint smile touched her lips.

Then Denzel’s voice grew quieter.

The instant the words left her mouth, her entire body trembled.

’But his touch felt so good.Doesn’t that mean I should at least try to know what it would feel like if he tried to.’

’I mean, it’s only seven minutes in Heaven. It isn’t really that big of a deal... right?’

Then her eyes drifted down toward his hand.

"Um...Your finger... It’s quite..."

"Big."

Her cheeks flushed.

"Bigger than any I’ve had."

Denzel raised an eyebrow.

"Oh, really?"

A grin immediately spread across his face.

Sarah blinked.

"Your dick?"

Then Denzel answered honestly.

"I mean... I’m pretty sure it’s the biggest you’ll ever seen."

"You’d be surprised by what I’ve seen." Sarah smiled.

Then he folded his arms.

"Alright. So how about this? How about I show you my dick, and if you like it enough, you let me put it in your ass."

Sarah thought for a moment, considering his offer, then she tilted her head.

"And what if it isn’t the biggest I’ve seen?"

Sarah hummed thoughtfully.

"Hmm..."

Then a smile slowly spread across her face.

"How about this? If it isn’t the biggest I’ve seen...then you have to let me finger your own ass."

She shot him a heavy smirk.

Denzel simply stared at her.

’What the fuck? What’s wrong with this crazy bitch? How did she even get that thought? I was trying to make a sexy deal, and somehow she’s made it weird.’

He forced himself to calm down.

’No. Calm down.This is fine. Besides, all I have to do is prove that my cock is the biggest.’

He paused. Thinking firmly on what his decision would be. Who wouldn’t at this point? His decision was either going to make or break him.

For a moment, he simply stood there.

Then a smile spread across his face.

"Alright then...I accept."
